history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A game-like “LEVEL UP!” interface screen shows progress stats in a dark purple theme with Indonesian text.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a centered UI panel displaying a circular avatar on the left and level/progress information in the middle, including “LEVEL,” “EXPERIENCE,” a progress bar, and smaller stat boxes.

Setting:
This is a digital interface on a dark, gradient background with soft lighting and neon-like accents; no physical environment is visible. The layout is centered and framed with rounded rectangles, suggesting a screen capture or UI display.

Visual Details:
At the top center, the text “LEVEL UP!” appears in large, bold, yellow-gold lettering with small diamond-like decorations on both sides. The central panel is a wide rounded rectangle with a darker interior and a subtle border. In the upper right of the main panel, there is a small pill-shaped badge with “#71” in yellow text. The left side contains a circular avatar image bordered by a purple ring. The central area shows two large rounded rectangles: a purple box labeled “LEVEL” with a large white number “3,” and a teal-green box labeled “EXPERIENCE” with “11 / 200” in white. Below them is a horizontal progress bar that is mostly dark with a small colored segment on the left (purple) and the percentage “5%” displayed to the right. Beneath the progress bar are three smaller dark rounded boxes: “MESSAGES” with a value “51,” “XP NEEDED” with a value “189,” and “NEXT LVL” with a value “4.” At the very bottom of the panel, there is faint, low-contrast text reading “Congratulations on leveling up!” The overall color palette is dark purple, with yellow-gold, teal-green, and white text.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Jangan di chat nom...
#71
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
3
EXPERIENCE
11 / 200
5%
MESSAGES
51
XP NEEDED
189
NEXT LVL
4
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image shows a dark-themed “Level Up” game progress UI with a level and experience breakdown. It includes a progress bar and counts for messages, XP needed, and the next level.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
